name: ez-money-management
description: Run the ez-money web app (Postgres + NestJS API + Angular UI) with one command.

scripts.dev: npm run db:up && concurrently -k -n api,web -c green,cyan "npm --prefix backend run start:dev" "npm --prefix frontend start"
scripts.setup: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install && node scripts/ensure-env.js
scripts.build: npm --prefix backend run build && npm --prefix frontend run build
